selfcheck.question: ¿Para qué sirve `if __name__ == '__main__'`?
selfcheck.chosen_text: Ejecutar el CLI/demo solo al correr el módulo, no al importar
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: if __name__ == '__main__' protects CLI/demo so it does not run on import. Not about speeding the interpreter or installing deps.

selfcheck.question: Precedencia correcta de config…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: canonical precedence: CLI flags > env vars > config file > defaults. Other orderings reverse the packet.

selfcheck.question: Exit code 2 en CLI argparse suele significar…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: argparse/CLI section treats bad usage as non-zero; option text maps exit 2 to usage/parse error — success is 0, not 2.

selfcheck.question: ¿Dónde van los logs de progreso?
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: stdout = data (JSON/CSV); stderr = logs and progress so redirection is clean. Progress does not go into the JSON file.

selfcheck.question: Añadir un subcomando nuevo compatible es tipicamente…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: SemVer: compatible feature (new subcommand) is minor; breaking is major; not 'delete the repo'.

selfcheck.question: ¿Qué no debe ir al git del paquete?
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: secrets stay out of git — .env with API_TOKEN is the forbidden one; README/pyproject/__init__ belong in the package repo.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
